Text: All calm in Winkl. Just feeding my Alpacas and chillin'.
All clear here. Kids are playing in the park.
Calm and serene morning. People are enjoying their coffee in the sun.
Currently everything quiet. Birds are chirping peacefully.
Eichgraben's as peaceful as ever. Not a zombie in sight.
Everything is fine here. Feels like the silence before the storm.
Had to flee my home, but all seems quiet now. Apparently the horde moved on.
Hey! I'm at Stephansplatz and just saw a huge crowd of... zombies?! No kidding!
Hietzinger Hauptstraße is a zombie hotspot right now. Do we have an apocalypse on our hands?
I have to report a large aggregation of zombies. My world is turning upside down.
I think I just saw a whole bunch of Zombies in the cemetary. Am I going crazy?
I went to bed early, but was awoken by loud noises in the street. Tons of Zombies outside, I don't know what to do!
It's a normal day in Neulengbach. Everyone's going about their business.
It's so quiet you could hear a pin drop. No signs of any zombies.
Just checking in to say that it's a beautiful, calm day.
Just saw a load of zombies in Winkl. I freed the alpacas.
Maxingstraße's gone full zombie mode. Hiding at home until this blows over.
Museumquartier is a mess right now, full of zombies! This can't be real, can it?
My god, it seems like the complete population from Vienna has turned into zombies!
Nothing happening in Maria Anzbach. Very boring. I dont't know what to do.
Okay, the storm has definitely arrived. Zombies detected in the dark. I am hiding in the basement.
OMG. I just saw the hugest bunch of Zombies shuffling through the neighbourhood.
Pressbaum is no longer zombie capital, most of the zombies have traveled through by now. Some of my neighbours joined them.
Purkersdorf is a mess. There's a massive horde of zombies, it's scary!
Schulgasse in Neulengbach has a zombie problem. Didn't see this coming.
Seeing lots of zombies on Linzer Straße, Gablitz. Stay indoors, folks!
So many zombies outside, shuffling through the dark. Where could they be heading?
So, Pressbaum is the new zombie capital? They're swarming Hauptstraße!
Something weird going on at Spittelberggasse. Looks like a zombie walk, lol!
Stephansplatz has been cleared of the zombies, apparently they moved on.
The whole Herrengasse is swarmed by what looks like zombies. Terrifying!
Tranquility prevails. Just saw a couple jogging by.
Untertullnerbach's got a zombie problem. Stay clear of Hauptstraße.
We are abandoning the Stadium, it is no longer safe. Massive zombie horde sighted.
Zombies are coming from the woods! We are history!
Zombies are overrunning Rathausplatz. What's next, aliens?
Zombies are swarming in from all directions. Even from the forest. Safe yourselves, avoid Pressbaum.
Zombies everywhere, I can't escape! This is a nightmare!
Zombies on Westbahnstraße. Send help ASAP!
Zombies overran the OBI. Is this a bad joke or what?
